query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN orderStatus = 2 THEN 1 END) as completed_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN orderStatus = -1 THEN 1 END) as cancelled_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN customerId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as orders_with_customer,
  MIN(orderDate) as earliest_order,
  MAX(orderDate) as latest_order,
  AVG(total) as avg_order_value,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customerId) as unique_customers_in_orders
FROM orders;
